categories.name: prompting techniques
categories.description: Prompt design, instruction patterns, few-shot examples, chain-of-thought style reasoning, prompt templates, and practical methods for improving model responses through input design.

categories.name: RAG and context handling
categories.description: Retrieval augmented generation concepts, document retrieval, chunk selection, grounding, context-window management, and using external evidence to answer questions.

categories.name: RAG evaluation and quality
categories.description: RAG quality measurement, retrieval metrics, answer evaluation, golden datasets, diagnostics, and methods for comparing retrieval or generation strategies.

categories.name: LLM security and risks
categories.description: Prompt injection, jailbreaks, data leakage, unsafe model behavior, adversarial inputs, and security controls or risk mitigations for LLM applications.

categories.name: LLM settings, cost, and tokens
categories.description: Model parameters, tokenization, context limits, latency, pricing, cost tradeoffs, temperature, sampling settings, and operational budget considerations.
